spec_match.rationale: Splendid representation of hardcoded constraints vs dynamic adaptivity using env(safe-printable-inset).

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, boasting two slider inputs that calculate pixel intersections and paint live red warning rectangles indicating cropped document pages.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Explains clearly the real-world issues where fixed values clip physical text pages.

edge_cases.rationale: Vividly calculates and highlights clipping boundary conditions when fixed margins drop below printer thresholds.

references.rationale: Exhibits the mandatory link pointing to the associated ChromeStatus milestones.

design_system.rationale: Perfect contrast ratios, proper flex column layouts, and consistent styling tokens.

summary: The print-preview is a top-tier concept workspace that dynamically proves how hardware printer clips occur and why safe-printable-inset fixes them.
